text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I couldn't do it. I couldn't win. Yet again...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I failed to meet everyone's expectations. My
father, my mother, the whole Satono family... and
even yours.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's start again from square one. If all of my
effort thus far has fallen short, it only means I
have to work even harder.
choice_data_list: Let's go for broke! You and me!
Let's go for broke! You and me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's start again from square one. If all of my
effort thus far has fallen short, it only means I
have to work even harder.
choice_data_list: Let's go for broke! You and me!
Let's go for broke! You and me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I'll get through any training necessary in
order to win next time!
choice_data_list: Start by taking some deep breaths.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: In... and out... Innnnn... and out...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Nothing is going to keep me down! Let's keep
going together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But if we're going broke, I guess I better get my
wallet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Going for broke" is just a saying but, either way,
she seems to have cheered up a bit. We're both
going to get back up and keep working.
